benefits.description: Down 10 pounds in 6 weeks, aiming for another 15 pounds
Weight loss at healthy rate of approximately 1.7 lbs per week

protocol_notes: Currently at 1.5mg/week on week 6. Plans to titrate slowly up to 3mg/week and stay there for several weeks before reducing. Running protocol through summer, ending around September 2026. Taking break for a few months, then restarting mid-January 2027. User is under 200 lbs and uses conservative dosing approach. Stores unreconstituted vials in freezer using insulated jar with silicone inserts, constituted vials in fridge.
